title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb - Vivere Urbino
snippet: Fabio Giglietto, professor of Sociology of Cultural and Communicative Processes at the University of Urbino, is the author of the study "A Pretty Blunt Approach: Meta's Political Content Reduction Policy and Italian Parliamentarians' Facebook Visibility," which was featured in a Rai3 program and is the basis for a European parliamentary inquiry.
description: The article discusses a study authored by Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, analyzing Meta's political content reduction policy and its impact on Italian parliamentarians' Facebook visibility, which was featured on Rai3 and is informing a European parliamentary inquiry.

title: La schedatura dei docenti, l’antifascismo e il tarlo della scuola del ’68 - Centro Studi Sereno Regis

title: L'articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
snippet: A recent research study by Fabio Giglietto, ordinary professor of Sociology of Cultural and Communicative Processes at the University of Urbino, is cited for its investigation into the impact of Meta's policy to reduce political content on Facebook.
description: This content cites a recent research study by Fabio Giglietto, an ordinary professor at the University of Urbino, focusing on the impact of Meta's policy to reduce political content on Facebook.

title: L’articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
Facebook, troppa visibilità a estremisti e complottisti: ecco come impatta Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: This article discusses a study authored by Professor Fabio Giglietto, which analyzed over 2.5 million posts on Facebook between 2021 and 2025. The research concludes that Meta's algorithmic suppression appears less effective against the actors it intended to target, particularly extremist accounts, and highlights their increased visibility during electoral periods.
description: An article discussing a study authored by Professor Fabio Giglietto, analyzing the effectiveness of Meta's algorithmic suppression against extremist accounts on Facebook and their increased visibility during electoral periods.
